buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.onrender.com https://*.supabase.co; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
